prompts.name: Coffee
prompts.text: Add a freshly brewed cup of coffee with rising steam, warm ceramic texture, and a cozy café-like feeling.

prompts.name: Tea Set
prompts.text: Add an elegant tea set with delicate cups, warm tea, subtle steam, and refined presentation.

prompts.name: Ramen
prompts.text: Add a steaming bowl of ramen with noodles, broth, toppings, chopsticks, and appetizing detail.

prompts.name: Bento Box
prompts.text: Add a neatly arranged Japanese bento box with colorful ingredients, clean presentation, and appealing food detail.

prompts.name: Sushi
prompts.text: Add a plate of sushi with fresh ingredients, careful arrangement, and polished food photography appeal.

prompts.name: Layered Cake
prompts.text: Add a beautifully decorated layered cake with cream, fruit, soft texture, and dessert-table charm.

prompts.name: Pastries
prompts.text: Add fresh pastries with flaky texture, golden crust, and bakery-style warmth.

prompts.name: Fruit Basket
prompts.text: Add a basket of fresh fruit with varied colors, natural shine, and abundant detail.

prompts.name: Picnic Food
prompts.text: Add a picnic spread with sandwiches, fruit, drinks, cloth texture, and relaxed outdoor charm.

prompts.name: Ice Cream
prompts.text: Add ice cream with creamy texture, colorful scoops, and playful dessert energy.

prompts.name: Street Food
prompts.text: Add lively street food with steam, paper trays, sauces, and casual market atmosphere.

prompts.name: Fancy Dinner
prompts.text: Add a refined plated dinner with elegant arrangement, restaurant lighting, and premium presentation.

prompts.name: Breakfast
prompts.text: Add a cozy breakfast scene with toast, eggs, fruit, coffee, and soft morning light.

prompts.name: Candy
prompts.text: Add colorful candy with glossy surfaces, playful shapes, and cheerful visual energy.

prompts.name: Hot Chocolate
prompts.text: Add a warm cup of hot chocolate with cream, marshmallows, steam, and cozy winter atmosphere.
